title: Monitoring Your Feed
description: Your footprint-scored Relevance Feed, the weekly recap, saved searches, and alerts.

steps.caption: Your Relevance Feed
steps.narration: The Monitor tab opens your Relevance Feed — every new regulation, scored against your footprint, so the changes that matter rise to the top.

steps.caption: Sort, filter, triage
steps.narration: Each item shows why it matched and how severe it is. Sort, filter and triage in bulk to keep your feed clear.

steps.caption: The weekly recap
steps.narration: The weekly recap rolls everything up — how many regulations changed, the most significant updates, and where your obligations and documents stand.

steps.caption: Catch up fast
steps.narration: It's the one place to catch up on a busy week across the whole corpus.

steps.caption: Save a search
steps.narration: Run a search you care about, then save it with one click.

steps.caption: Find them under My Vantage
steps.narration: Your saved searches live under My Vantage, ready to re-run any time — and they can feed your alerts.

steps.caption: Set your alerts
steps.narration: Under Alerts, choose how you hear about new matches — in-app, an email digest, or web push.

steps.caption: Preview the digest
steps.narration: Preview your digest to see exactly what lands in your inbox — here, twenty-five matches from the last twenty-four hours.
